requirement_topic.en: Electrical safety — RETIE and RETILAP under adopted IEC/NTC family
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——RETIE/RETILAP 下之 IEC/NTC 體系

summary.en: Colombian household refrigerators entering the market are subject to RETIE and RETILAP electrical-control logic before placement. Safety is assessed against local adoptions of IEC family requirements (through ICONTEC NTC alignment) and enforced through destination-country compliance channels. Models must follow Colombia-relevant voltage, frequency, marking, and protection conditions, including any required documentation prepared for the destination importer and regulator file.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚市场销售的家用电冰箱须在投入销售前按RETIE和RETILAP进行电气合规控制。安全性按哥伦比亚采纳的 IEC/NTC体系要求执行（通常由 ICONTEC 采标），并通过目的地监管流程实施。型号需满足哥伦比亚相关电压、频率、标识和防护条件，并与进口商、监管文件对应。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞市場銷售之家用電冰箱須在投放前依照 RETIE 與 RETILAP 進行電氣合規控制。安全性按哥倫比亞採納之 IEC/NTC 體系要求執行（通常由 ICONTEC 採標），並透過目的地監管流程實施。型號需符合哥倫比亞相關電壓、頻率、標識及防護條件，並與進口商、監管文件對應。

standards_or_laws: RETIE (Technical standard for electrical installations and equipment safety in Colombia)
RETILAP (related electrical safety and technical documentation framework)
ICONTEC NTC adoption of IEC appliance safety baselines

summary.en: China uses GB 4706.13-2014 and related NTC-sourced references via IEC 60335-2-24 for household refrigerators, with CCC marking in the Chinese conformity system. Safety reports and tests are mandatory in China, but they are not automatically transferable to Colombia's RETIE destination channel.
summary.zh: 中国对家用电冰箱采用GB 4706.13-2014等GB/T/IEC系列（源自IEC 60335-2-24）并通过CCC体系实施，安全检测报告在中国是强制性的，但不能自动用于哥伦比亚的 RETIE 入门槛链路。
summary.zht: 中國對家用電冰箱採用 GB 4706.13-2014 等 GB/T/IEC 系列（源自 IEC 60335-2-24）並透過 CCC 體系執行，安全檢測報告在中國為強制性，但不能自動用於哥倫比亞 RETIE 入場鏈路。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1-2005 — General electrical safety framework for household appliances

gap.en: Voltage/frequency mismatch is a real redesign and documentation trigger. China defaults to 220/380 V and 50 Hz conditions in industrial context, while Colombia uses 110/220 V and 60 Hz for many segments. For many export models this requires revalidation of ratings and wiring assumptions, not only label text changes. Chinese CCC certification is strong technical evidence but not destination-complete for Colombia, so retesting or certified body review may still be needed against Colombia's adopted requirements.
gap.zh: 电压频率不匹配是实际触发项。中国默认工艺多为220/380V、50Hz，而哥伦比亚许多场景是110/220V、60Hz。许多型号可能需要对额定参数和线束配置进行复核，而不仅是改标。中国CCC是有力技术依据，但不足以完成哥伦比亚目的地合规，需按当地要求进行复核或复测。
gap.zht: 電壓頻率不匹配是實際觸發項。中國默認工藝多為220/380V、50Hz，而哥倫比亞許多場景為110/220V、60Hz。許多型號可能需要對額定參數及線束配置進行複核，而不僅是改標。中國 CCC 是有力技術依據，但不足以完成哥倫比亞目的地合規，需按當地要求進行復核或複測。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RETIE and RETILAP compliance is required for import, sale, and distribution in Colombia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4706.13 safety compliance is mandatory for domestic sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Safety is mandatory for Colombia market entry and follows RETIE/RETILAP technical control. China CCC evidence is useful but does not automatically satisfy Colombian destination requirements due to different national baseline, voltage context, and filing channel. Confirm voltage/frequency compatibility and obtain Colombia-channel compliance alignment before sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚市场入场对电气安全是强制要求，按 RETIE/RETILAP 技术控制执行。中国CCC证据有价值，但因国家基准、频率电压和备案渠道不同，不能自动满足哥伦比亚要求。应确认电压/频率兼容并完成哥伦比亚渠道合规匹配后再销售。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞市場入場之電氣安全為強制要求，按 RETIE/RETILAP 技術控制執行。中國CCC 證據有價值，但因國家基準、頻率電壓與備案管道不同，不能自動滿足哥倫比亞要求。請確認電壓/頻率兼容並完成哥倫比亞管道合規匹配後再銷售。
